summary: Iteration 24 - MoodMeter Backend + Frontend Testing Complete. 13/13 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: MoodMeter component with vote buttons, progress bar, VOTED badge, HD polish with glass morphism, animated gradient banners, polished contest cards with participant progress bars, 5-tab navigation with glass morphism.

minor.issue: Returns 500 for some matches (likely missing cricketdata_id)
Returns 500 for some matches (likely missing cricketdata_id)

backend.mood_meter_get_public: PASS - GET /api/matches/{id}/mood-meter returns vote counts, percentages, team names
backend.mood_meter_get_with_auth: PASS - GET with auth shows user_vote field
backend.mood_vote_validates_team: PASS - Invalid team name rejected with 400 error
backend.mood_vote_success: PASS - Valid vote recorded, returns updated counts
backend.mood_vote_change: PASS - User can change vote (upsert behavior)
backend.mood_meter_invalid_match: PASS - Returns 404 for invalid match ID
backend.mood_vote_invalid_match: PASS - Returns 404 for invalid match ID

frontend.homepage_dual_banner: PASS - Fantasy Points (green) and Contest Coins (gold) banners with animate-gradient-shift
frontend.homepage_live_ticker: PASS - IPL LIVE ticker with team logos
frontend.homepage_match_cards: PASS - Match cards with team logos and team card image backgrounds
frontend.homepage_ipl_standings: PASS - IPL 2026 Standings table with team logos
frontend.match_detail_hero: PASS - Team card image background, glass morphism, team logos, scores
frontend.match_detail_mood_meter: PASS - MoodMeter component renders between hero and tabs
frontend.mood_meter_vote_buttons: PASS - Two vote buttons (MI vs CSK) with team logos
frontend.mood_meter_progress_bar: PASS - Progress bar shows vote percentages (50%/50% initially)
frontend.mood_meter_voted_badge: PASS - VOTED badge appears after clicking vote button
frontend.mood_meter_vote_count: PASS - Shows total vote count (1 vote)
frontend.tab_bar_glass_morphism: PASS - 5 tabs (Contests, Live, Scorecard, Squad, Fantasy Pts) with glass morphism
frontend.contest_cards_styling: PASS - Contest cards show entry fees, pool amounts, participant progress bar
frontend.leaderboard_page: PASS - Leaderboard shows with trophy icon, player entries with rounded avatars, bold names, points, prizes

critical_code_review_comments: MoodMeter.jsx: Well-structured component with proper data-testid attributes, handles both compact and full modes
MoodMeter.jsx: Uses apiClient for API calls, properly handles loading and error states
matches.py: mood-vote endpoint properly validates team names against match.team_a.short_name and match.team_b.short_name
matches.py: mood-meter endpoint optionally reads Authorization header to check user's vote
ShareCard.jsx: Properly receives moodData prop and conditionally renders mood meter bar when total_votes > 0
LeaderboardPage.jsx: Fetches moodData for ShareCard integration
App.css: Glass morphism (.glass, .glass-heavy) and animate-gradient-shift properly defined
seed_data_creation: None - used existing MI vs CSK live match (94502b0e-7e28-4f72-b4a2-86a09febdd24)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 verified MoodMeter feature (backend + frontend). Key findings: (1) POST /api/matches/{id}/mood-vote requires Bearer token auth and validates team names, (2) GET /api/matches/{id}/mood-meter is public but shows user_vote when auth provided, (3) MoodMeter component renders on match detail page between hero and tabs, (4) VOTED badge appears after voting, (5) ShareCard receives moodData prop for WhatsApp share, (6) HD polish verified: glass morphism, animated gradient banners, polished contest cards. Use MI vs CSK live match for MoodMeter testing.

features_verified.mood_vote_backend: VERIFIED - POST /api/matches/{id}/mood-vote with auth, team validation, upsert behavior
features_verified.mood_meter_backend: VERIFIED - GET /api/matches/{id}/mood-meter returns vote counts, percentages, user_vote
features_verified.mood_meter_frontend: VERIFIED - MoodMeter component with vote buttons, progress bar, VOTED badge, vote count
features_verified.share_card_mood_data: VERIFIED - ShareCard.jsx receives moodData prop (conditionally renders when total_votes > 0)
features_verified.hd_polish_glass_morphism: VERIFIED - .glass and .glass-heavy classes in App.css with backdrop-filter blur
features_verified.hd_polish_gradient_animation: VERIFIED - animate-gradient-shift on dual points banner
features_verified.contest_cards_progress_bar: VERIFIED - Participant progress bar on contest cards
features_verified.tab_bar_glass_morphism: VERIFIED - Tab bar uses glass class with proper active state indicator
features_verified.leaderboard_polished_styling: VERIFIED - Rounded avatars, bold names, gold/silver/bronze rank styling
